news.title: 🇫🇷 telegram founder pavel durov: france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron "is losing legitima
news.summary:
🇫🇷 telegram founder pavel durov: france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron "is losing legitimacy"

elon musk has been summoned again for questioning by the paris prosecutor's office in connection with allegations of distributing illegal sexualized images.

according to the times, the questioning is considered "voluntary," and the prosecutor's office has also summoned linda yaccarino, the former ceo of x, the social media platform owned by musk.

this procedure was initiated as part of a case opened earlier last year regarding the distribution of illegal sexualized images and deepfakes on the social media platform. the allegations are based on the premise that grok may be capable of generating sexualized images.

the authorities have not specified whETHer musk will face penalties if he fails to appear for questioning, but they noted that his absence will not halt the investigation.

according to the newspaper, other employees of x are expected to be summoned for questioning this week.

meanwhile, pavel durov, against whom french authorities have also brought several charges, stated that france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron, "is losing legitimacy because it is using criminal investigations to suppress freedom of speech and privacy."

news.title: 🇬🇧 british police have arrested two teenagers over an attempted arson attack on the kenton united sy
news.summary:
🇬🇧 british police have arrested two teenagers over an attempted arson attack on the kenton united synagogue in northwest london

a 17-year-old boy and a 19-year-old man were detained after a “firebomb”, a bottle containing accelerant, was thrown through a window into a medical room. the fire caused minor smoke damage, and no injuries were reported.

counter terrorism policing is investigating whETHer the suspects are linked to a group with ties to the iranian islamic regime.

the incident is part of a series of recent arson attacks targeting jewish sites in london. 

police also reported an attempted arson at a business linked to the jewish community on friday, and earlier arrests were made over another synagogue attack last week. 

in a separate incident last month, ambulances belonging to the volunteer emergency service hatzola were set on fire in golders green.

news.title:
vitalik buterin: 이더리움 must withstand the day all core developers leave

speaking at the 4th hong kon
news.summary:
vitalik buterin: 이더리움 must withstand the day all core developers leave

speaking at the 4th hong kong web3 festival on april 20, 2026, vitalik buterin @vitalikbuterin stated that 이더리움's goal is not to be the fastest chain or compete with high-frequency trading platforms, but to serve as a secure, decentralized, and reliable network. 

to support long-term digital assets, he noted that 이더리움 is advancing formal verification through ai and pursuing quantum resistance. ultimately, 이더리움 strives to pass the "walkaway test" similar to 비트코인, ensuring the network can function stably as a long-term foundation even without the ongoing involvement of core developers.

video

news.title: sonic research states that most pos 블록체인s rely on elliptic-curve signatures and aggregation schemes
news.summary: sonic research states that most pos 블록체인s rely on elliptic-curve signatures and aggregation schemes that are vulnerable to quantum attacks and difficult to replace without significant protocol changes and performance trade-offs, while soniccs, which relies only on per-event signatures and hash functions, can transition to post-quantum security by replacing its signature scheme without altering its core consensus design.

news.title:
코인base, bybit explore bringing u.s. stocks on-chain

코인base is in discussions with bybit to explore
news.summary:
코인base, bybit explore bringing u.s. stocks on-chain

코인base is in discussions with bybit to explore 토큰ization, custody, and global distribution of assets including u.s. public and pre-ipo stocks.

the talks do not involve any equity investment or bybit’s u.s. market entry, sources said. bybit’s u.s. expansion is expected to proceed via a separate entity led by former co-ceo helen liu with a local partner providing licensing and compliance. both 코인base and bybit declined to comment. 

previously, wu 블록체인 exclusively reported that 코인base and bybit were in talks regarding an investment cooperation agreement, through which bybit aims to enter the u.s. regulated market.

sulaiman ahmed (@shaykhsulaiman)

ceasefire update: iran-u.s draft proposal

✅ iran agrees
news.summary:
협상 초안이래


sulaiman ahmed (@shaykhsulaiman)

ceasefire update: iran-u.s draft proposal

✅ iran agrees to a 15-year enrichment suspension, with the exception of research reactors for medical isotopes.

✅ iran’s stockpile of 60% and 20% uranium would be partially converted to reactor fuel, and partially ‘downblended’ to a lower enrichment level. however, it won’t leave iran.

✅ full iaea supervison on iran’s nuclear sites.

✅ opening the strait of hormuz, with the possibility of collecting tolls.

✅ the u.s. will offer iran phased 제재 relief

✅ the u.s. will unfreeze all iranian assets currently frozen abroad, amounting to $20 billion or more.

✅ the u.s. will commit to a non-aggression pact with iran that is ensured through a un national security council reSOLution and a treaty ratified by congress.

✅ the u.s. will withdraw all its military forces from the persian gulf.

source: amit segal israel channel 12

news.title:
🇩🇪 germany’s economic motor shifts from global car giant to europe’s military industrial hub

german
news.summary:
🇩🇪 germany’s economic motor shifts from global car giant to europe’s military industrial hub

germany is experiencing its longest period of stagnation since world war ii. the manufacturing sector is reportedly losing around 15,000 jobs per month, while major carmakers such as volkswagen and mercedes-benz have seen profit declines of over 40%.

in response, berlin has committed more than $500 billion (€460 billion) in defense spending over the next decade, with annual military expenditure projected to reach around $190 billion by 2029.

several industrial conversions are already underway:

- rheinmetall is repurposing former auto-parts facilities in berlin and neuss for military production.

- volkswagen is reportedly discussing converting its osnabrück plant to produce defense-related components, including transport vehicles and missile systems.

- knds has acquired a former alstom rail factory in görlitz to produce components for leopard 2 tanks and puma infantry fighting vehicles.

defense companies such as henSOLdt are also recruiting engineers and technicians from automotive suppliers like continental and bosch.

the german defense industry association has nearly doubled its membership in a year, as civilian suppliers shift toward military contracts. some firms, such as schaeffler, are also expanding production into drones.

analysts estimate that raising defense spending to 3% of GDP could generate tens of billions in annual output and create up to 245,000 jobs.

📰: wsj

news.title:
🇮🇶🇮🇷 iran just picked iraq's next prime minister.  

bassem al-badri is now the coordination framewo
news.summary:
🇮🇶🇮🇷 iran just picked iraq's next prime minister.  

bassem al-badri is now the coordination framework's unified candidate after nour al-maliki stepped aside and endorsed him. 

that alone would be notable. but the detail that matters: esmail qaani flew to baghdad and personally backed al-badri during the visit.  

tehran doesn't make that kind of trip for nothing.  

iraq's shia factions are notoriously fractured. getting them to conSOLidate behind a single candidate requires either a very long negotiation or a very clear signal from the top. 

this looks like the latter.  

al-maliki doesn't withdraw quietly unless he's been told to. his endorsement of al-badri reads less like political generosity and more like instructions received.  

the iraqi parliament will go through the motions. but the real conversation already happened in a room with qaani.  

source: al jazeera








mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇮🇷 the iranian foreign minister declared the strait of hormuz open. the irgc publicly called his tweet "bad and incomplete." 

this is not a good cop bad cop routine but a clear power struggle happening in public, in real time, over the most valuable waterway on earth.

here's exactly what happened in the last 72 hours.

araghchi posted on x that the strait was completely open for commercial vessels for the remainder of the ceasefire. markets 급등d, oil dropped, 트럼프 thanked tehran. 

it looked like the biggest diploMATIC breakthrough of the war.

then tasnim news, the outlet directly linked to the irgc, posted a series of attacks on iran's own foreign minister. 

the headline: "bad and incomplete tweet by araghchi and incorrect ambiguity-creation regarding the reopening of the strait of hormuz."

the irgc's argument was specific and deliberate. araghchi published his declaration without explaining the conditions, the coordinated route requirements, or the military oversight mechanisms. 

more importantly, tasnim warned that passage is "null and void in the event of the continuation of the claimed naval blockade." the us blockade is still in place. therefore, per the irgc, the strait is not actually open.

then came the line that reveals the real message. tasnim wrote: 

"the tweets that officials publish, even if they write them in english, are not seen only by foreign officials. the great nation of iran is fully monitoring the scene in accordance with its revolutionary duty."

that is the irgc telling the foreign ministry that its communications are being watched for ideological compliance. 

what this means for the negotiations is significant.

araghchi was the man in the room in islamabad for 21 hours. he is the one conducting the diploMATIC track with pakistan, egypt and turkey acting as mediators. he is the face of whatever deal might be possible before april 21. 

and the irgc publicly undermined his credibility and his authority to make commitments on open radio and state-linked media simultaneously.

the structural problem has always been this. any deal araghchi signs has to survive contact with an irgc that answers to the supreme leader's office, not the foreign ministry. 

in the past iran managed this division quietly. what's different now is they're airing it publicly

source: jerusalem post











— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2046284903415947508#m

news.title:
🇺🇸🇮🇷 day 51 of the iran war and the oil shock is getting real.

roughly 600m barrels are now off the
news.summary:
🇺🇸🇮🇷 day 51 of the iran war and the oil shock is getting real.

roughly 600m barrels are now off the market, around $50b wiped from global supply. 

the strait of hormuz normally carries about 20% of the world’s oil, and flows have collapsed.

the international energy agency has labeled this the largest oil supply shock in history, triggering record releases from global strategic reserves (including a massive 400m barrel drawdown coordinated by iea members).

source: @kobeissiletter










mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇺🇸 diesel prices are spiking while consumer sentiment collapses.

trucking costs are up 30%, and americans spent an extra $10b on gas in just 50 days, hitting everyday costs hard.

as fuel rises, everything else follows.

source: @kobeissiletter

video

news.title:
us small businesses are pulling back on investment as if we are in a crisis:

in march, only 16% of
news.summary:
us small businesses are pulling back on investment as if we are in a crisis:

in march, only 16% of small businesses said that they plan on investing in capex over the next 6 months, the lowest reading since november 2009.

this percentage has declined -12 points since november 2024.

by comparison, the pre-2008 financial crisis and the 2020 pandemic levels were 30-35%.

furthermore, the proportion of firms investing in capex over the last 6 months has declined -9 points since january, and remains below the long-term historical average.

this comes as policy uncertainty and elevated energy costs are weighing on small businesses.

all while they cite taxes, quality of labor, and 인플레이션 as their most important problems.

small businesses are struggling in the us.

news.title:
상황 업데이트: 

1) 미국이랑 이란 외교부 라인은 협상 확신중.  그래서 시장은 반등 중.  

2) 이란 군부 라인은 계속 꺵판 치는중.  그래서 시원하게 반등은 못하는 중.
news.summary:
상황 업데이트: 

1) 미국이랑 이란 외교부 라인은 협상 확신중.  그래서 시장은 반등 중.  

2) 이란 군부 라인은 계속 꺵판 치는중.  그래서 시원하게 반등은 못하는 중.  

3) 고노고는 아직 팬티 입어 콜 유지중.  애시당초 딱히 전쟁 때문에 입힌게 아님.    

4) 더 많은 정보 필요.  관망중.

news.title: in tuapse, black “rain” has been reported following a fire at an oil terminal, while authorities cla
news.summary:
in tuapse, black “rain” has been reported following a fire at an oil terminal, while authorities claim air quality remains safe.

a dark residue has covered cars, roads, and buildings after a drone strike on a local refinery. fuel also entered the black sea, where a large oil slick of about 10,000 square meters has been observed.

russian authorities said the fire did not lead to significant air pollution.

many residents have already begun to evacuate the city on their own.
